homepage.title: Stavíme stavby - HSF SYSTEM HSF SYSTEM
homepage.text_excerpt:
Stavíme stavby - HSF SYSTEM HSF SYSTEM
Projekty realizujeme s maximální spolehlivostí díky využívání
vlastních zdrojů. Špičkovou kvalitu zajistí náš zkušený
tým odborníků.
S námi máte jistotu, že zhotovené stavby budou odpovídat nejvyšším standardům.
služby
stavby
GENERÁLNÍ DODÁVKY STAVEB
Zajistíme kompletní servis od přípravy projektové dokumentace,
od návrhu až po realizaci, včetně inženýrských služeb pro
stavební povolení a kolaudaci.
projekce
PROJEKCE A INŽENÝRSKÁ ČINNOST
Nabízíme komplexní projekční a inženýrské služby, které zaručí
efektivní a kvalitní realizaci.
pláště
STŘEŠNÍ A OBVODOVÉ PLÁŠTĚ
Montujeme různé typy fasád a střech s důrazem na kvalitu a
efektivitu. Naše vlastní montážní týmy a technologie
jsou zárukou rychlé realizace.
3D tisk
AUTOMATIZOVANÝ 3D TISK BETONU
Spojení s Coral Construction Technologies přináší
unikátní technická řešení a neomezené možnosti pro
realizaci projektů bez kompromisů. 3D tisk otevírá
nové cesty v designu i architektuře.

PURPOSIA Group
PURPOSIA Group nám umožňuje efektivní řízení a přístup ke sdíleným zdrojům.
Využíváme synergické efekty holdingu s rychlejším přístupem k inovativním řešením.

about.text:
o nás - HSF SYSTEM HSF SYSTEM
Ing. Jan Hasík
CEO and Chairman of the Board of Directors,
one of the company's founders and a two-time Entrepreneur of the Year.
He prides himself on top-notch construction implementation
and views his employees as equal partners.
Tomáš Hess
Commercial Director, member of the Board of Directors and one of its founders.
He not only sets up business relations with partners, but also helps to create
a quality management environment, as evidenced by the prestigious
title of the Best Managed Company in the Czech Republic.
Ing. Tomáš Kosa
Director of the Czech and Slovak company and Vice-Chairman of the Board of Directors.
In the Czech and Slovak  markets, he ensures that the entire construction group
is based on the same values. It is built on three pillars - quality, expertise and reliability.
Jan Vitvar
Key Account Manager and Member of the Board of Directors.
High quality team is the basis of our success
Our quality is confirmed by many achievements in professional competitions and
a top ten ranking in the Rating of the Foundation
for the Development of Architecture and Civil Engineering.
Milestones
from our history
2002
Založení české firmy HSF System
2008
První zahraniční stavby v Polsku a na Slovensku
2010

2011
Obrat našich firem přesáhl
1 miliardu korun

v Ostravě, Česká republika

v Žilině, Slovensko

projects into real
buildings across Europe
We turn your vision into reality. Every project is built with a focus on functionality and lasting value.
Our commitment to quality is reflected not only in the satisfaction of our clients and investors,
but also in the recognition we’ve received from professional community.
Reliable approach to general
deliveries of constructions
We offer comprehensive construction works including design and engineering activities.
Up to one third of the work is carried out directly by our specialists.
overview of projects
Social responsibility
and support to important projects
We not only build, but also help where needed. We support projects that make a positive difference.
From cultural events to improving public spaces.
we support

and approach
Every construction is a new challenge for us, and we place emphasis on progress and sustainability.
We build to the most stringent certifications and reduce our carbon footprint.

products.text:
služby - HSF SYSTEM HSF SYSTEM
Non-standard
technical solutions
We build on a solid foundation of tradition,
but we are also open to new technologies and practices.
Team creativity allows us to think outside the box and deliver innovative solutions
that meet even the most demanding requirements.
Digitisation saves
time and costs
Thanks to the implementation of Civil Engineering 4.0, which includes
the digitalization and automation of construction processes,
we bring greater efficiency and accuracy to our clients.
With modern technologies such as Building Information Modelling (BIM)
and construction production management, we ensure faster
and better quality project delivery.
Innovation
and sustainability
We cooperate with the Moravian-Silesian Innovation Centre and support
startup projects bringing new technologies and innovative solutions.
We build sustainably and responsibly in accordance
with relevant certifications such as BREEAM, DGNB and others.
delivery of constructions
We provide a comprehensive service from the preparation of project documentation through engineering,
the construction itself up to the building approval. We implement projects with an emphasis on efficiency,
quality and meeting all deadlines.
Efficiency
and time saving
We ensure a smooth flow of the entire construction process,
which leads to minimized delays and reduced risk of delays.
This way, we deliver projects on time and without unnecessary complications.
Professional
approach
We are a reliable partner that takes care of all aspects of the construction process.
The management of construction contracts is carried out by special teams
led by experts specialising in this segment of the business.
Zobrazit projekty
design and engineering activities
We will provide the necessary project documentation from studies to its implementation,
engineering activities for obtaining building permits or building approval.
Tailor-made
with advanced technologies
We are investing in modern technologies such as BIM, drones and virtual reality,
which allow us to better plan and monitor every step of the construction process before the actual implementation.
Communication
with authorities and knowledge
of regulatory rules
We will handle the building permit and all related documentation associated with the construction process.
The engineering experts will ensure that all steps to obtain a building permit, or even approval,
are carried out in accordance with current regulations.
Zobrazit projekty
roofing and cladding
The cladding provides protection to buildings and adds to their overall impression.
We started with the installation of roof and external cladding,
so we carry with us a rich experience supported by many years of experience.
Variety
and flexibility of solutions
We offer various types of facades and roofing. Whether it's rainscreen facade systems,
sandwich panels or louvered facade systems, our solutions will improve the appearance and insulation of your building.
